content:
hello! another newbie looking for some team building ideas with my current roster. my current team for story purposes (partway through chapter 5) is mono aequor (caecus/pontos/miryam/tulu or support gmurphy) and i've basically tripped up fantastically playing anything else, especially in endgame modes. looking for some advice on who to run together to make several useable teams and not just living in my biased fish world all the time 

caecus and murphy are my favourite characters so far so i'd love to main them. i'm also planning to pull for pollux and corposant when they rerun, as well as castor and arachne in the future.

thank you!

i'll try the Autita-Celeste team seems fun to play but need to continue story to chapter 7 hahaha
Didn't really had time to continue ch6 but damn story really good
got it~ I will try out the team combo appreciate your help <:YangyangLove:1091193604959113317>

Hey there.

You can try Saya-Thaïs-Corpo-Aurita
I think Clem goes OK with Cassiah and you could add Tinct and a shielder / healer ( ie Winkle )
Agripa does not seem widely used as I understand but she could make a versatile addition to Arachne ( though that one will be hard to get dupes for since her banner was up recently ).
Liz and Nymphaea are both poison too so maybe add a support like Faint, Aigis or Leigh.
Faros can go poison too but you might want some sustain in that team.

Just a reminder : in some mode, you get symptoms if you can't clear the encounter past turn 6.

 Basically, given your rooster I would focus on 1 ou 2 awakeners you like for each team and pull to build around them.
I highly recommand you try all awakeners in the last tab of the report button

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

If you want more advanced advices I could review your proposed teams but you can ask veterans in https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1433513650299076780

Though in the end, it's all about putting together a team and using it to find out what works best for you ( you will eventually want 5 working lineups ).
